subject: An elf archer perched in the boughs of a great tree, drawing back a longbow and aiming upward at a winged creature in flight
description: A lithe elven archer crouches among the mossy branches of an enormous tree, body coiled in a stable shooting stance. She wears a green leather hood and tunic that blends with the forest canopy. Her longbow is fully drawn, arrow nocked and aimed upward and to the right where a winged silhouette glides through hazy daylight between the leaves. Sunlight filters down in soft beams, lighting her face and bow arm while the deeper canopy fades into mossy shadow. The mood is alert, predatory, calm — a hunter taking the shot.
foreground: elf archer drawing a longbow on a thick mossy branch
background: filtered canopy light with a winged creature flying between leaves
